title: Garlic Whisk Delight
description: A nutty and fluffy show-off Uruguayan dish featuring a blend of garlic and whisk that is vegan-friendly and easy to make.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup vegan mayonnaise (or avocado puree for a smooth texture)
ingredients.notes: Use low heat to avoid burning

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the whole wheat flour and minced garlic.
Gradually add in the vegan mayonnaise (or avocado puree) while continuously stirring with a whisk to achieve a smooth texture. The mixture should be thick but spreadable.
Season with sea salt to taste.
Transfer the mixture onto a flat surface, use your fingers or a piping bag to shape it into a desired form, such as small balls or flat discs.
Place the formed shapes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and refrigerate for 15 minutes before baking.
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake for approximately 20-25 minutes until golden brown. Keep an eye on them, as they can burn easily at this stage.
